## Linked issue

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — tooling, config, dependencies
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `refactor` — no behaviour change

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is based off `dev`
- [ ] I have linked the issue this PR resolves
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes locally
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes locally
- [ ] I have addressed CodeRabbit comments
- [ ] DTOs used for all controller inputs
- [ ] No `console.log` in committed code
- [ ] No `.env` values hardcoded anywhere
